## What & why
<!-- What does this change and what problem does it solve? Link any issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other:

## Checks
<!-- The exact commands CI runs — please run them locally first. -->
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` (in `cue-desktop/src-tauri`)
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` and `npm run build` (in `cue-desktop`)
- [ ] New/changed behavior has tests
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits

## Notes for reviewers
<!-- Anything tricky, trade-offs, follow-ups, or things to verify manually. -->
